вҡ  Consumer Count Logic (11KV Trip): Consumers = "Affected Consumer" from latest step in Tripping Restoration report. If Res%=0 вҶ’ 100% affected. PTW 11KV uses Affected Load Details. 33KV priority: downstream 11KV feeders tagged UNDER 33KV are not counted separately to avoid double-counting.
